/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/packet_analyzer.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/packet_analyzer.dir/src/pcap_reader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/packet_analyzer.dir/src/packet_parser.cpp.o -o packet_analyzer
